name: Unusual Cloud Storage Access
description: An unusual access pattern to a cloud storage service has been detected, which could indicate an attempt at data exfiltration.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the earliest event in the aggregation window.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account performing the download activity.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the file being downloaded.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The source IP address of the access.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of download events within the timeframe.
